name: ui-ux
description: UI/UX best practices with per-stack skills: shadcn/ui, ReUI, Aceternity UI, Astryx, Tailwind, CSS3, Bootstrap, CSS Grid, Flexbox — plus a design-tokens skill (spacing/type/radius/elevation/motion scales + semantic color tiering), theme creation for shadcn/ReUI/Aceternity, Tailwind, or Bootstrap with a live colour preview, a /ui-ux:build entry point, and ui-ux-reviewer + ui-ux-engineer agents.
